note: Real db_bench multireadrandom runs supplied in review (2026-07-07), matching paper Figure 1(b): io_uring MultiGet + Direct I/O on NVMe, BLK_MAX_REQUEST_COUNT 32 vs 1, 30 s fixed duration, batch_size 32 (histogram count x 32 = operations). Measured ratios: throughput 1.18x, P50 1.37x lower, P75 1.41x lower - matching the paper's claimed 1.2x / 1.37x / 1.41x. Side assignment by the data: the slower run (51,251 ops/sec, P50 678 us) is Vanilla V=32; the faster (60,589 ops/sec, P50 494 us) is tuned V=1. Both measured in separate real runs; the demo replays them side by side, time-compressed.
